mapper.update: UPDATE open_app_secret SET app_id = #{appId}, secret_key = #{secretKey}, secret_version = #{secretVersion}, status = #{status}, expire_time = #{expireTime}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, version = #{version} + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = false
UPDATE open_app_secret SET deleted = true, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, app_id, secret_key, secret_version, status, expire_time, tenant_id, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, deleted, version FROM open_app_secret WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = false

SELECT id, app_id, secret_key, secret_version, status, expire_time, tenant_id, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, deleted, version FROM open_app_secret WHERE app_id = #{appId} AND deleted = false ORDER BY secret_version DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM open_app_secret WHERE app_id = #{appId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND deleted = false
SELECT MAX(secret_version) FROM open_app_secret WHERE app_id = #{appId} AND deleted = false
